title: Prescription of taxes, interest, and penalties
doc_html:
§1579.  Prescription of taxes, interest, and penalties

There shall be no prescription running against any state tax, license, excise, interest, penalty or other charge levied under this Sub-title, except that ordained in the Constitution of Louisiana.
doc_text:
§1579.  Prescription of taxes, interest, and penalties
There shall be no prescription running against any state tax, license, excise, interest, penalty or other charge levied under this Sub-title, except that ordained in the Constitution of Louisiana.
